description: Rust MCP server and CLI for yt-dlp search, downloads, metadata, transfers, and Plex playlists.
name: ai.dinglebear/ytdl-rmcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional Plex server URL for playlist and Plex sync workflows.
environmentVariables.name: YTDLP_PLEX_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional Plex token for playlist and Plex sync workflows.
environmentVariables.name: YTDLP_PLEX_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional AcoustID client key for identification and auto-retagging workflows.
environmentVariables.name: YTDLP_ACOUSTID_CLIENT_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional GitHub release tag override for the downloaded YTDL RMCP binary.
environmentVariables.name: YTDL_RMCP_BINARY_VERSION

environmentVariables.description: Optional release download base URL override.
environmentVariables.name: YTDL_RMCP_RELEASE_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Tracing filter for YTDL RMCP logs.
environmentVariables.name: RUST_LOG

title: YTDL RMCP
